title: Obsidian Wither Storm
description:
Changes CWSM's Witherstorm's texture into obsidian!!!! 
hooray.
body:
this texturepack works best if played with intention of not taking it seriously

[Resource Pack used in the Banner: Totally Accurate Wither Storm]
[Shader Pack used in the Banner: Complementary Shader + Euphoria Shader]

nothing other than witherstorm itself included into obsidian infestations








# **REQUIRED!!!!!**

## **[Cracker's Wither Storm Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/crackers-wither-storm-mod)**

## **[[ETF] Entity Texture Feature](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures)**

## **[MoreMcmeta](https://modrinth.com/mod/moremcmeta)**



# Credit

[Nonamecrackers2](https://modrinth.com/user/nonamecrackers2), [McFella](https://modrinth.com/user/McFella), [WONazareth](https://modrinth.com/user/WONazareth) - **Cracker's Wither Storm Mod**

[soir20](https://modrinth.com/user/soir20) - **MoreMcmeta**




## **Semi-compatible Resource Packs**

**[VN4's Fresh Wither Storm](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/vn4s-fresh-wither-storm) |** _**The FWS + RWS and TAW Obsidianized texturepack must be above the aforementioned texturepack.**_

**[Totally Accurate Wither Storm](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/totally-accurate-wither-storm) |** _**The FWS + RWS and TAW Obsidianized texturepack must be above the aforementioned texturepack.**_

![FWS + RWS and TAW Obsidianized](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a369e0c9acf9d6682b4a5751646c23a0a507e94b.png)

_Note: The FWS + RWS and TAW Obsidian is located in Addon folder. You can just exclude the base OWS texture pack and directly add the addons, it's just without the respective texturepack, vanilla CWSM would lose it's tentacle. YOU CAN STILL PLAY INDIVIUALLY WITH EACH COMPATIABLE TEXTUREPACK!! THERE'S NO NEED FOR VN4'S Fresh Wither Storm AND Totally Accurate Wither Storm TO BE ACTIVE AT THE SAME TIME!!_

_Note 2: The Obsidian Sickened Mob addon is located in Addon folder. It is unfortunately WIP and unfinished so not all sickened mobs have Obsidian variants._
